emails.subject: Re: #486435
emails.body: Re: #486435 Matt Motley and Mike Swerzbin both said this trade should be desk-to-desk and has nothing to do with Bonneville. Could you send me a copy of the confirm letter? They'd like to look at it to try and figure out what trade BPA is referring to. If it's a hard copy, you can fax it to 503-464-3740. Thanks a lot. Kate From: Kimberly Allen 01/04/2001 03:16 PM
